title: More Nonsense Limerick 64
content:
There was an old person of Nice,
    Whose associates were usually Geese.
    They walked out together 
    In all sorts of weather,
    That affable person of Nice!
meaning:
"More Nonsense Limerick 64" is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
